templates.title: Approval-gated action
templates.description: Human-in-the-loop: gather inputs, then require a second user to approve. Demonstrates the approval step with four-eyes default.

composition.name: approval_gated_action
composition.description: Collect parameters then require a second approver before executing the action.

action_description.description: Short summary of what is about to happen (shown to the approver).

templates.title: Scheduled wait
templates.description: Suspend until a future ISO timestamp (or 1h from now). Demonstrates wait_until for time-driven workflows. Add a tool step after the wait to actually do something.

composition.name: delayed_action
composition.description: Suspend until a specified time, then execute downstream steps.

wake_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the composition should resume. Defaults to one hour from launch.

templates.title: Wait for external callback
templates.description: Suspend and hand the external system an HMAC-protected callback URL. Resume when the external system POSTs back. Demonstrates wait_callback.

composition.name: wait_for_external_callback
composition.description: Suspend until an external system POSTs to the generated callback URL.

job_label.description: Tag for the external job — included in the callback payload.

wait_callback.description: Awaiting external system to POST back to ${suspension.callback_url}

templates.title: Simple elicit (Q&A)
templates.description: Ask the caller a single question mid-flight and inject the answer into the next step. The minimal suspending composition.

composition.name: ask_one_question
composition.description: Ask the caller a yes/no question, return the answer.

question.description: The question to put to the caller.
